title: Where by virtue of Part VA of this Ordinance, as modified by this
content:
Part of this Schedule, a personal representative of the deceased 
employer is liable to pay a severance payment, or part of a 
severance payment, and that liability had not accrued before the 
death of the deceased employer, it shall be treated for all purposes 
as if it were a liability of the deceased employer which had accrued 
immediately before his death.
Part II
Last updated date
1.5.2025
